titleStmt.title: SII 38.227: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 227. (A.R. No. 227 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the base of the Subrahmaṇya shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription contains an order pertaining to the gift of Periyamullaivāyil in Nāyaṟu-nāḍu in Puḻar-kōṭṭam of 30 vēli extent including the wet and dry lands therein as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili. The taxes and levies kaḍamai, veṭṭi, śiṟupāḍikāval, arimukkai, kaṇkāṇi, eḍuttukkoṭṭi and such levies in kind (paddy) and in cash were included in the grant. The proceeds from the land and from the levies were to serve as capital for providing for the worship and food offerings to the deity, Vīra-Narasiṁhēśvaram-uḍaiyār, set up by the donor in the prākāra (tiruchchuṟṟālai) of the temple of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr-uḍaiya nāyanār and also for defraying the expenses on the maintenance and repairs in the premises of the shrine.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 9vatu viranārasiṁhatevaṉāṉa yātavarāyaṉ Olai . jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭamāṉa vikkirama coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār
tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyanāyiṉār koyiṟtāṉattār kaṇṭu tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyanāyaṉārkoyiṟ tiruccuṟṟālaiyil nām Eḻuntaruḷuvitta nāyaṉār viranārasiṁhaśvara muṭaiyanāyaṉāṟku tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa Ikkoṭṭattu
nāyaṟu naāṭṭup periyamullaivāyil nāṟpāl Ellaiyum ŪppaṭṭaRead uḷppaṭṭa veli nilam 3 10 Innilam muppatiṟṟuveliyum naṉcepuñce Uṭppaṭṭa Eppeṟpaṭṭa kaṭamaiyum veṭṭiyuñ ciṟupāṭikāval Arimukkaiyuṅ kaṇkāṇi Eṭuttukkoṭṭi
yuṭpaṭṭa nellāyamum kācāyamum Uṭpaṭa Arccanābhohattukkum pūcaikkum Amutupaṭikkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalākac cantirātittavarai celvatāka viṭṭom Ippaṭikkuk kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷvate Ivai yātavarāya
ṉ Eḻuttu Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai .—
Digital edition of SII 38.227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
